body.question: What looks like it would fit there?
body.taxonomy_is_cc0_proposal: Akien supplied the QUESTIONS. The `function` and `class` fields are CC.0's proposed taxonomy and are OVERRULABLE — do not treat them as his.
body.notes: This IS the graph-tree lookup, in meatware: what pattern activates for this shape?
body.source: Akien, 2026-07-12 — 'this is the oldest batch' (direct dictation), plus the pattern-selection sequence quoted verbatim from ~/.unseen_university/akien/20260702.ClaudeWebOnCorticalColumnsAndEachQuestionATreeAndPrediction.txt
body.why_this_corpus_matters: These are the NOVELTY HANDLER. Akien 2026-07-12: 'I have figured out novelty. I not only have the questions to ask in the face of novelty. but if those fail, I have the questions to ask to sort the questions to ask. and I can do that in a graph tree.' This corpus is the seed for the INTERVIEW / intention-extraction stage — the hardest step of the whole compiled-inference pipeline. These are not notes. They are the SPEC.
